description: ThousandEyes capabilities for software companies, SaaS providers, ISPs, telecommunications, and technology companies

common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes monitors multi-tenant SaaS platforms with global coverage, synthetic testing, and customer-specific performance visibility.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides comprehensive API monitoring including response time, availability, error rates, and transaction validation.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors GraphQL endpoints through HTTP/API testing with query validation and performance metrics.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors microservices through distributed tracing, API testing, and service dependency mapping.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors AWS services including EC2, S3, CloudFront, and application endpoints with global vantage points.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors Azure services and applications with cloud agents and Enterprise Agents in Azure regions.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors GCP services and applications with cloud coverage across Google Cloud regions.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides unified monitoring across AWS, Azure, GCP, and private cloud with single pane of glass visibility.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors CDN performance including cache hit rates, origin latency, and edge server response times globally.
Yes. ThousandEyes analyzes CDN routing, identifies performance bottlenecks, and provides path visualization for optimization.
Yes. ThousandEyes integrates with CI/CD pipelines through API for automated testing and deployment validation.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors GitHub availability and can integrate via webhooks for automated workflows.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors Atlassian services and integrates with Jira for automated ticket creation from alerts.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides real-time BGP monitoring with route change detection, prefix hijack alerts, and path analysis.
Yes. ThousandEyes Internet Insights provides global outage detection with ISP and application-level visibility.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors DNS servers, resolution time, DNSSEC validation, and authoritative nameserver performance.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors SSL/TLS certificate validity, expiration dates, and handshake performance with automated alerts.
Yes. ThousandEyes maintains SOC 2 Type II certification for security and operational controls.

common_requirements.requirement: GDPR compliance for monitoring EU users
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes supports GDPR compliance with data residency options, data retention controls, and privacy features.
Yes. ThousandEyes Endpoint Agents provide real user monitoring capturing actual user experience and performance metrics.
Yes. ThousandEyes Web Transaction tests simulate user workflows including login, search, checkout with detailed performance metrics.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides monitoring from 193+ cloud agent locations globally plus custom Enterprise Agent deployment.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides comprehensive REST API for test management, data retrieval, and integration automation.

common_requirements.requirement: Terraform provider for infrastructure as code
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes offers official Terraform provider for managing tests and configuration as code.
Yes. ThousandEyes integrates with Slack and Microsoft Teams for real-time alert notifications and collaboration.
Yes. ThousandEyes integrates natively with PagerDuty and Opsgenie for automated incident creation and escalation.

common_requirements.requirement: Historical data retention for trend analysis
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes retains historical performance data with configurable retention periods for long-term trend analysis.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides customizable dashboards with widgets, scheduled reports, and role-based access control.

common_requirements.requirement: Data export to data warehouse (Snowflake, BigQuery)
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes supports data export via API and can integrate with data warehouses for advanced analytics.
Yes. ThousandEyes can feed data to status pages via API or integrate with services like Statuspage.io for public transparency.
